package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for slice_append_without_prealloc_known_bound: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Slice append inside a range loop without visible preallocation when the bound is locally known.
type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundModel
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundService struct {
    repo *CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBound(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundDTO) error {
    focus := "slice_append_without_prealloc_known"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_negative := map[string]int{"slice": 1, "append": 2, "prealloc": 3, "known": 4, "bound": 5}
    slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    slice_negative_0 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_0
    append_negative_1 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_negative["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_negative_1
    prealloc_negative_2 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_negative["prealloc"] + len(input)
    _ = prealloc_negative_2
    known_negative_3 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_negative["known"] + len(input)
    _ = known_negative_3
    bound_negative_4 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_negative["bound"] + len(input)
    _ = bound_negative_4
    return nil
}
